Programming

POWER IN

MOTION.

This is my channel, GoldenD60, and this is where I put all my passions into motion. I’ve been creating and uploading since I was a kid — talking weird facts you probably didn’t know about, talking about the latest updates, and producing electronic music that hits with energy and emotion. For me, it’s not about being perfect; it’s about experimenting, having fun, and sharing the journey with anyone who wants to come along. Every video is my way of learning, growing, and hopefully inspiring you to do the same. If you’re into Minecraft, music, or just creative chaos, you’ll feel right at home here.

LATEST CONTENT



Minecraft Copper Drop

Minecraft just dropped the craziest update yet, and I had to talk about it. After 4 years, the Copper Golem is finally coming into the game — and it’s not alone: we’re getting copper tools, armor, and even a chest in the next drop. If you thought the mob vote meant it would never happen, think again — Minecraft keeps surprising us! In this video, I break down all the details and share my first thoughts on this wild update. Curious to see the Copper Golem in action and how all the new copper gear works? Click on the next video to see it for yourself!

New Minecraft Music Disc

Minecraft recently added the Lava Chicken music disc, and I had to check it out for myself. After the Minecraft movie news and the new Dennis painting, Mojang keeps surprising us — and this disc is fire (literally). Click on the video to find out why Mojang may have added this banger and hear it for yourself!

When Dream Misses The Bus

Remember that viral Minecraft trend where everyone was trying to copy the Minecraft YouTuber 'Dream' in his PvP skills? Well, I jumped in and made my own twist. In this video, you’ll see me attempting some insane parkour runs, and just having a ton of fun along the way. This was a one-off video for a viral trend and the time, and it's currently my most popular video. If you love Minecraft parkour, unexpected moments, and content that’s as much about laughing as it is about skill, click on the video here!


Weird Minecraft Facts Series

When most people hear GoldenD60, the first thing that comes to mind is probably my “Weird Minecraft Facts” series — and for good reason. Over the course of a year, I released 11 episodes diving into some of the strangest, most surprising, and just plain weird corners of Minecraft. From hidden mechanics to bizarre game quirks, this series wasn’t just about showing facts; it was about exploring the game in ways most players never even noticed. Each episode was packed with discoveries that were equal parts entertaining and mind-blowing, giving viewers something fresh every single time.

This series is what helped shape my channel and brought in most of the subscribers I have today. It captured the spirit of curiosity and excitement I’ve always tried to bring to my content: combining gameplay, knowledge, and personality into videos that feel alive and shareable.

Whether you’re a longtime fan or new to my channel, the “Weird Minecraft Facts” series is a perfect starting point. It’s a mix of surprises and genuine Minecraft knowledge that showcases exactly what my channel is all about — curiosity, creativity, and a love for everything quirky in the Minecraft universe. Dive in, explore the weird, and see why this series became such a cornerstone of my channel.
